form.formComment: Was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, weakening late to finish a 1.5 lengths fourth (22.65) over 390m at Warrnambool. Has clocked a sharp 22.19 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Geelong (23.14) in a Grade 5 H, finishing a 8 length fourth. Has two successes and four minors from 12 starts from box 2. Among the main chances.
